channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Multiple potholes along centre of first couple hundred feet of Westbury Road - reported numerous times yet no-one ever fixes - why do I pay council tx?, 20th May
item.description:
From #2 thru #12 - down centre of street. This has been a problem for SEVERAL years - why is it not fixed yet? - Why do I pay council tax? Isn't it supposed to cover this?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Westbury Road, Leckhampton, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pedestrian pathway, 20th May
item.description:
The pathway is in a complete and lots of tarmac cracked away , big holes. Very unsafe for pedestrians. It’s a large stretch of path about 60-70mtrs estimated.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 6, Oakfield Street, Warden Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Other damage to pavement i.e. cobbles, raised mound/surface

item.title: TMC - Defects - Road Markings problem, 20th May
item.description:
Faded road markings. Please refresh. 29x 600x200 double dashes 12 x 600x100 single dashes 2 x 2m centre lines Road closure (Faded Road Markings)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Uneven pavement on the path between Laxton Road and Green Lane, 20th May
item.description:
The pavement between Laxton Road and Green Lane is uneven in parts. This can be hazardous for wheelchair users.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Laxton Road, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Other damage to pavement i.e. cobbles, raised mound/surface

item.title: Vegetation obscures lighting path feels unsafe after dark, 20th May
item.description:
Vegetation obscuring lighting. Pathway feels unsafe after dark. Most of path is poorly lit because of this
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Langdale Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 20th May
item.description:
3 way traffic lights 28 day please cut back stinging netals and b brambles vegetation approx 45 metres x2 meters footway closure (Overgrown Hedge)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The way the Kissing gate opens blocks wheelchair users., 20th May
item.description:
Opposite Orchard Park. The Kissing gate connects Green Lane to Laxton Road. The way the gate swings when opened blocks wheelchair users from accessing Laxton Road.If it opened to the right (ie with hinges on the other side of the gate, access would be much easier. I am aware of at least one resident in a wheelchair who has fallen over while trying to get through.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Library garden needs maintenance, 20th May
item.description:
The grass hasn't not been mown for over a month in the Heater Ways library garden.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 22, Goldsmith Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Told not to walk here, 20th May
item.description:
People wearing official looking ID lanyards by the visitor centre over the weekend told a group of us that we had to stick to the official footpath, and directed us back through the carpark and onto a narrow track which looking at the map now wasn't an official footpath and in fact leads straight to where we were walking anyway. they were quite intimidating and we cut our walk short and returned to the car via another route to avoid the people
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): A417, Badgeworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large surface area damage with loose material, 20th May
item.description:
The lead-in section of road to number 24
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 24, Collum End Rise, Warden Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, again, 20th May
item.description:
More flytipping in this location and in many other areas around here. I ask the council launch an investigation in to this ongoing issue. Simply cleaning it up and doing nothing else encourages further incidents. Precedent is being set that flytipping is an effective method of waste disposal.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hayden Road, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 20th May
item.description:
More flytipping in the area. This is becoming a common occurrence.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Withybridge Lane, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipped kids ride on toy, 20th May
item.description:
A pink little tikes ride on toy with no roof has been left on the pavement on Marsh Drive for the last couple of weeks.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 5, Marsh Gardens, Wymans Brook, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other FW6 Surface problem, 20th May
item.description:
FW abrupt level difference 2000mm x 1000mm x 22mm Give and take TM Outside number 4 (FW6 Abrupt Level Differences)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other FW6 Surface problem, 20th May
item.description:
NWD GIVE AND TAKE PLEASE BRING X2 UNEVEN FOOTWAY BOARDS OUT PLUS X2 SANDBAGS PLACE 1 BY TREE OUTSIDE NUMBER 1 ANS OTHER OUTSIDE NUMBER 6 (FW6 Abrupt Level Differences)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 20th May
item.description:
Permanent Repair CWPH 900 x 300 x 81mm Marked as X Standard TM (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 20th May
item.description:
ENWD CWPH 900 x 300 x 81mm Marked as X Standard TM (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW10 Potholes problem, 20th May
item.description:
CW Pothole 600mm x 400mm x 44mm Temporary Closure 15min db ///salon.decreased.midfield (CW10 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Replacement Tree, 20th May
item.description:
A tree that was replaced after I asked for it in 2024, outside my House (61 Sandyleaze GL2 0PX) died and was yesterday removed, will the tree be replaced?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sandyleaze, Longlevens, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other FW6 Surface problem, 20th May
item.description:
FW abrupt level difference 400mm x 300mm x 21mm 1 x NSD Give and take TM At Railings (FW6 Abrupt Level Differences)
Report on FixMyStreet
